45.reason: [Should store k instead of on, otherwise op1 will contain out‑of‑bounds indices]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.2 , reason:  错误：应该存储运算符下标k，而不是on（on是运算符总数），导致后续访问越界或错误
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  错误：这里应该存储运算符下标k，而不是on（on是运算符总数），导致后续访问op_stack[op1[k]]时越界或错误
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Should store k instead of on, otherwise op1 will contain out‑of‑bounds indices]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  这里应该赋值为k而不是on，否则后续访问op_stack[op1[k]]会越界且逻辑错误
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Error: 'on' is the total count of operators, should be 'k' (current loop index) to correctly store the position of '*' or '/'.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.25 , reason:  [Should store index `k`, not `on`; this causes incorrect indexing in later multiplication/division steps]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Should store index `k`, not `on`; this causes incorrect indices for multiplication/division operations]

49.reason: 错误：将减法变为加法时，应该将减号后的数取负，但这里修改了num_stack[k+1]，而后续乘除运算会再次修改该值，导致逻辑混乱；且未处理减号本身，导致后续求和时减号对应的num_stack[k]未被清零

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.2 , reason:  错误：将减法变为加法时，应该改变当前运算符后的数字符号，但这里改变了num_stack[k+1]，而后续乘除运算可能覆盖该值，且逻辑上应处理运算符本身
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  错误：将减法变为加法时，应该将减号后的数取负，但这里修改了num_stack[k+1]，而后续乘除运算会再次修改该值，导致逻辑混乱；且未处理减号本身，导致后续求和时减号对应的num_stack[k]未被清零

54.reason: [Incorrect operand order and logic: should combine values at op1[k]-1 and op1[k]+1, but current indexing is wrong due to earlier error]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.2 , reason:  错误：op1[k]存储的是on（越界值），导致访问op_stack越界，且乘除运算逻辑错误，应使用正确的下标
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.25 , reason:  [Incorrect operand order and logic: should combine values at op1[k]-1 and op1[k]+1, but current indexing is wrong due to earlier error]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Incorrect operand order and logic: should combine values at op1[k]-1 and op1[k]+1, but indexing is wrong due to earlier error]
